title: Mob Death Sounds
description: A simple fabric mod that plays a sound when the mob kill stat is increased.
body:
The "Mob Death Sounds Mod" is a minimalistic yet effective modification for Minecraft that enriches the gaming experience with auditory feedback. Every time a player kills a mob, a custom sound is played.
 
You have the whole Minecraft default sounds to choose from and if you want you can use sounds from Resourcepacks. Furthermore, you can adjust the pitch value as you like.


**Commands:**

/mobs set [sound] [pitch] [ This lets you set the desired sound. ]

/mobs on/off [ This lets you activate/deactivate the mod. ]

/mobs forcesound off [ This lets you to turn off a running sound directly. ]

/mobs default [ This lets you sets the settings back to the default sound. ]
